title: Income Tax Department Clarifies Applicable Act for AY 2026-27 ITR Filing; Forms Available!
content:
# Income Tax Department Clarifies Applicable Act for AY 2026-27 ITR Filing; Forms Available!

Ek important update hai. Income Tax Department ne Assessment Year (AY) 2026-27 ke Income Tax Return (ITR) filing ke liye applicable Act aur form availability par clarification announce kiya hai.

Yahan kuch key takeaways hain:

*   **Applicable Act:** Please note, for AY 2026-27 (income earned in Financial Year 2025-26), the **Income Tax Act, 1961**, along with **Income Tax Rules, 1962**, will apply fully. The new Income Tax Act, 2025, and Income Tax Rules, 2026, will be effective for Tax Year 2026-27 onwards (i.e., income earned from April 1, 2026, to be filed in 2027). Isse transition ke around jo confusion tha, woh clear ho gaya hai.
*   **ITR Forms Notified:** Income Tax Department ne already sabhi ITR Forms (ITR-1 se ITR-7 tak, aur ITR-U bhi) AY 2026-27 ke liye notify kar diye hain.
*   **Form Availability on E-filing Portal:** As of June 2, 2026, ITR-1 (Sahaj) aur ITR-4 (Sugam) ke Excel utilities aur online filing options e-filing portal par available ho gaye hain. Taxpayers ab ITR filing start kar sakte hain.
*   **Corrigenda Issued:** CBDT ne ITR Forms (ITR-1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6) aur Income Tax Rules se related corrigenda bhi issue kiye hain, jisme minor errors rectify kiye gaye hain.
*   **Important Dates:**
    *   **Last Date for ITR Filing (Individuals - Non-Audit Cases):** For AY 2026-27, the due date for most individual taxpayers not requiring an audit is **July 31, 2026**.
    *   **Last Date for ITR Filing (Non-Audit Business/Professionals - ITR-3 & ITR-4):** The due date for non-audit business and professional cases (filing ITR-3 & ITR-4) has been extended to **August 31, 2026**.
    *   **Recommendation:** Taxpayers ko suggest kiya jaata hai ki woh **June 15, 2026** tak wait karein, jab tak Form 16/16A aur Annual Information Statement (AIS) / Form 26AS data fully update aur reconcile na ho jaaye. Isse accurate filing ensure hogi.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.incometax.gov.in/iec/foportal/news-e-campaigns)

*Published on: 2 June 2026*
